title: Leaving Dressrosa — Closing Beat
description: Luffy’s allies prepare to escape while Fujitora and the Marines make their move.
scene: On pages 19–20, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Fujitora, Dressrosa Citizens, Marines deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Bellamy, can you stand?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I can run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Alright, sounds good!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Trafalgar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why didn't you kill me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Straw-hat-ya insisted that you were his friend so we brought you here. If you really do have a deathwish from here on out, be my guest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I've lost my place to die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thanks to those dwarves, I've healed like crazy...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: And now I've gotta meet my maker at the hands of a bunch of marines!? Why!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: dying is dying. So hurry up and get on with it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you ain't gonna even say thanks, we don't got any business with you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What was that!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Yo, yo. We don't have time for this. Run, comrades!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This way, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Let's hope we don't run across FuJITORA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Try not to get Sep- Arated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Rumble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Luffy- Senpai !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I just remembered; I've got something I need to do. Go on, I'll catch up later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: What? Lucy and the others have...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: They're being chased... they'll embark soon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: No! I... I didn't get a chance...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: to thank Lucy yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: ...ch. 796 / end you

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Now then... has your luck run dry?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ALLOW ME THE COURTESY OF FINDING OUT... WITH ALL MY MIGHT!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Admiral Fuutora finally makes his move!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
